steps.title: Identify the parallel structure
steps.content: The blank completes enjoyed and ______. The and joining them signals both terms should express compatible attitudes.

steps.title: Match the attitude to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean a positive reception that parallels "enjoyed" — readers liked the book enough for it to win the Newbery Medal. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — rejected: "enjoyed and rejected" — rejected means refused or dismissed, the opposite of positive reception. ✗
  • Choice B — created: "enjoyed and created" — created means made or produced; readers didn't create the book, they read it. ✗
  • Choice C — praised: "enjoyed and praised" — praised means expressed admiration for, forming a natural positive parallel with enjoyed. ✓
  • Choice D — ignored: "enjoyed and ignored" — ignored means paid no attention to, contradicting the award-winning reception described. ✗
That matches Choice C — praised.
